name: Branch Management
summary: Git branch operations for projects. Lists local and remote branches and supports switching between branches via git checkout.
goals: List local and remote git branches for a project
Switch between branches using git checkout
Display current branch in a dropdown selector

acceptanceCriteria.then: all local and remote branches are listed with the current branch highlighted

acceptanceCriteria.when: user switches to a different branch
acceptanceCriteria.then: git checkout is executed and the project state updates

end-to-end.then: the checkout succeeds and the UI shows the new branch

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
